detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use rtcpsu driver.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_alarm_interrupt_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This is the alarm example using the driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_alarm_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This is the alarm example using the driver in polled mode.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_periodic_alarm_interrupt_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This is the periodic alarm example using the driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_seconds_interrupt_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This is the seconds example using the driver in interrupt mode.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_seconds_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This is the seconds example using the driver in polled mode.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_set_calibration_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This example contains the functions which updates the calibration register value.

sect1.title: xrtcpsu_set_time_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XRtcpsu driver directly. This example contains the functions which updates the current time.
